chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-2273 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.10348/2024 2. For hearing of main case 01.10.2025 None present for the petitioner Ms. Saima Imdad, AAG --------- This case was lastly taken up on 16.05.2024, which is nearly one and half years ago. In the last one and half years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
